note: N-free multi-fidelity. IMPORTANT: S1_single/S2_double below are the coarse-fine (4deg/900s -> 2deg/300s) frontier winners. They must be re-verified at 1deg/150s (see verified_1deg_150s), where 300s-optimistic candidates can fail. Omega0=0 (R02). eps0=1e-3, C2>=0.95.

S2_double.note: 300s winner S=1440 (90x16) drops to C1=0.99889<0.999 at 150s; 1480 is the first S meeting BOTH at 150s

refined_integer_scan_1deg_150s.method: integer steps of 2 around frontiers, 450s coarse -> 1deg/150s fine
refined_integer_scan_1deg_150s.S2_note: 1482 (38x39,F=37) feasible at 450s, fails at 1deg/150s (C1=0.99854<0.999). 1480 is the true 150s minimum.
